# mxroute_email_quota (Data Source)

Fetches per-mailbox storage usage from the MXroute account.



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Read-Only

- `accounts` (Attributes List) Per-mailbox storage usage. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--accounts))
- `id` (String) Data source identifier — the account username.
- `username` (String) The account username the mailbox usage belongs to.

<a id="nestedatt--accounts"></a>
### Nested Schema for `accounts`

Read-Only:

- `email_address` (String) The mailbox email address.
- `size_bytes` (Number) Storage used by the mailbox, in bytes.
- `updated_at` (String) When the mailbox usage was last computed.
